name: iris-kit
description: Shared Iris packages for standalone apps.

scripts.test: pnpm verify:dependency-lock && pnpm --filter @iris/identity test && pnpm --filter @iris/svelte-ui test && pnpm --filter @iris/hashtree-app test && pnpm --filter @iris/release-tools test && pnpm --filter ndk test && pnpm --filter ndk build && pnpm --filter ndk-cache test && pnpm test:packed-consumer
scripts.test:packed-consumer: node scripts/pack-runtime.mjs dist-runtime ndk ndk-cache && node scripts/test-packed-consumer.mjs
